observations.text: Synthetic core sawtooth oscillations: periodic central soft-X-ray collapses. For UI and contract validation only.

hypothesis: Sawtooth crashes pace the core at ~250 Hz.
limitations: This record uses SYNTHETIC educational data only.
This is not FAIR MAST data and is not from any real device.
This record is for read-only analysis and decision support.
This record has no command/control path or hazardous operating procedure.
This record is not a standalone authority for safety-critical operation or reactor design decisions.

shot.notes: Synthetic core sawtooth oscillations: periodic central soft-X-ray collapses. Not real measurements.

claims.statement: Regular sawtooth crashes (period ~4 ms, ~250 Hz) periodically flatten the core soft-X-ray profile.

evidence.rationale: Twelve evenly spaced central-SXR collapses give a sawtooth period near 4 ms.
limitations: Mediated evidence link; not direct phenomenon observation.
